Inspect redirect rules loaded from redirects.yaml and Ghost exports

Usage:
  nectar redirects [--collapsed] [--json] <subcommand>

Arguments:
  subcommand          `list` (print redirect rules) or `validate` (parse and report duplicates)

End of options:
  Use `--` before positional values that start with `-`, for example `nectar new post -- --config`.

Options:
  --collapsed         Show the first-match rule set after dropping later duplicate source paths (`list` only)
  -j, --json          Emit redirect validation or inventory as JSON
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > .nectarrc > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --collapsed → NECTAR_REDIRECTS_COLLAPSED

Repeated flags:
  Scalar string flags use the last value.
  List-style string flags accumulate as comma-separated values in argv order.
  Boolean flags use the last positive or negated spelling.

Examples:
  nectar redirects list
  nectar redirects list --collapsed --json
  nectar redirects validate
